Tests that extra info arrives for the worker main script.

worker in main frame
attached to http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSent: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSentExtraInfo requestId matches: true
responseReceived: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
responseReceived requestId matches: true
responseReceivedExtraInfo requestId matches: true

worker in grand-child frame
attached to http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSent: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSentExtraInfo requestId matches: true
responseReceived: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
responseReceived requestId matches: true
responseReceivedExtraInfo requestId matches: true

worker in worker in main frame
attached to http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSent: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSentExtraInfo requestId matches: true
responseReceived: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
responseReceived requestId matches: true
responseReceivedExtraInfo requestId matches: true

worker in worker in grand-child frame
attached to http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSent: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
requestWillBeSentExtraInfo requestId matches: true
responseReceived: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/fetch/resources/worker.js
responseReceived requestId matches: true
responseReceivedExtraInfo requestId matches: true
